title: Valve Level Design Documentation
creator: Valve Developer Community
description: A community-maintained index of Valve mapping concepts, Hammer workflows, entities, optimization, compile tools, and game-specific techniques.
useful: Combines production terminology with technical implementation details for GoldSrc and Source projects.
audience: Mappers and technical level designers working with GoldSrc, Source, Half-Life, or Portal.
learning: Find Hammer tools and mapping terminology
Connect entities and compile tools to level behavior
Locate game-specific optimization and workflow guidance
